title: Parking and civil enforcement occupations
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of security workers and security guards. All protective service supervisors not listed separately above. Patrol assigned area to prevent fish and game law violations. Investigate reports of damage to crops or property by wildlife. Compile biological data. (Based on 16 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Search for lost articles or for parents of lost children.
Provide customer assistance and information, such as giving directions or handling wheelchairs.
Sell or collect admission tickets, passes, or facility memberships from patrons at entertainment events.
Clean facilities such as floors, locker rooms, or projection booths.
Issue ticket stubs, log tags, or matching tags for locating parked vehicles.
Explain and calculate parking charges, collect fees, and respond to customer complaints.
Call emergency responders or provide motorist assistance, such as helping jump start a stalled vehicle.
Maintain a lost-and-found collection and assist patrons in finding their lost items.
Perform regular maintenance tasks on equipment and inspect for proper functioning.
Park and retrieve automobiles for customers in parking lots or garages.
Monitor patrons' facility use to ensure compliance with rules and safety standards.
Inspect vehicles for damage and monitor traffic flow to assist pedestrians.
Direct traffic movement or warn of hazards, using signs, flags, or hand signals.
Inspect establishments housing animals for compliance with laws and issue citations as needed.
Compile and present evidence for court actions and testifying in civil or criminal court proceedings.
Respond to critical incidents, such as emergencies or safety hazards.
Educate the public about animal welfare and animal control laws and regulations.
Conduct investigations and report safety concerns to maintain a safe environment.
Implement processes to reduce property or financial losses and improve safety procedures.
Complete and maintain records of weather, beach conditions, emergency medical treatments, and other incident information.
Inspect recreational equipment and facilities for safety hazards, cleanliness, or damage.
Provide assistance with staff selection, training, and supervision, including training new or temporary staff.
Patrol assigned areas by vehicle or on foot to enforce parking ordinances and ensure public compliance.
Monitor activities in assigned areas to detect hazards, disturbances, or safety infractions, including using communication devices to report.
Respond to and process inquiries, complaints, and reports concerning parking violations, issuing warnings or citations as necessary.
Investigate reports of animal attacks, animal cruelty, and damage to crops or property to determine causes and provide preventive advice.
Provide advice or information to the public regarding parking regulations, wildlife conservation, and the location of points of interest.
Prepare and maintain required records of parking enforcement activities, citations issued, and emergency calls.
Apprehend or evict trespassers or rule violators from the premises, and report disturbances or suspicious activities.

emerging_tasks.task: Download digital keys to unlock digital movie files.
Ingest digital content, such as films, advertisements, or trailers, into servers or projectors.

Operate drones for surveillance of large areas and tracking of wildlife.
Perform traffic control duties such as setting up barricades and temporary signs, placing bags on parking meters to limit their use, or directing traffic or pedestrians.
